component.name: Porthole
component.summary: See which dev ports are running and which tunnels point where

description.p: Porthole lists the dev ports that are LISTENing on your machine, maps each one to the project that owns it (resolved from the process working directory), and surfaces tunnels pointing at those ports from ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, Tailscale, and localtunnel, all from a system-tray menu.

ul.li: Running dev ports with the process behind each one
Which project owns each port, grouped per project
Public tunnel URLs one click away
Open in browser, copy the URL, or kill the process
Ignore list to hide noisy system services

description.p: First Linux release: full parity with the macOS app.
